meta.name: EnviroArmour
meta.heroTitle: IP54 Weatherproof Enclosure for Equipment Protection
meta.heroDescription:
Lockable polycarbonate and fibreglass enclosures engineered to protect electronic equipment from harsh environments, vandalism and ingress.
Available in multiple sizes with clear or opaque door options and integrated mounting plate.
Suitable for fire alarm panels, remote annunciators and other sensitive electronics requiring indoor or outdoor protection.
